connectorUiConfig.title: Red Canary Threat Detection (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Red Canary](https://www.redcanary.com/) data connector enables Red Canary to publish detections into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework push pattern and the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

sampleQueries.query:
RedCanaryDetections_CL
| summarize Detections = count() by detection_severity_s
| sort by Detections desc

dataTypes.name: RedCanaryDetections_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
RedCanaryDetections_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
RedCanaryDetections_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Typically requires the Application Developer role or higher.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign the Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on the data collection rule. Typically requires Azure RBAC Owner or User Access Administrator.

customs.name: Red Canary
customs.description: Access to configure the Microsoft Sentinel response action in Red Canary.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create connector resources
instructionSteps.description: Deploy the CCF push resources required for Red Canary detection ingestion.

parameters.content:
#### Automated configuration and secure data ingestion
Clicking **Deploy** creates the Log Analytics table, Data Collection Rule (DCR), Data Collection Endpoint (DCE), Microsoft Entra application, application secret, and role assignment required to ingest Red Canary detections through the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure Red Canary
instructionSteps.description: Use the generated values to configure Red Canary to send detections to this Microsoft Sentinel workspace.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the connector to get the Application ID

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the connector to get the application secret

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint URI
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint URI

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the connector to get the Data Collection Rule Immutable ID

parameters.content: Configure the Red Canary Microsoft Sentinel response action with the values above. Red Canary should post detection records to the Logs Ingestion API endpoint using the stream name `Custom-RedCanaryDetections`.

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend
    detection_object = todynamic(iif(isempty(tostring(detection)), '{}', tostring(detection))),
    host_object = todynamic(iif(isempty(tostring(host)), '{}', tostring(host)))
| project
    TimeGenerated = now(),
    child_process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(child_process_iocs_s)), tostring(child_process_iocs_s), tostring(child_process_iocs)),
    cross_process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(cross_process_iocs_s)), tostring(cross_process_iocs_s), tostring(cross_process_iocs)),
    host_os_family_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_family_s)), tostring(host_os_family_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_family)), tostring(host_os_family), tostring(host_object.os_family))),
    host_os_version_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_version_s)), tostring(host_os_version_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_version)), tostring(host_os_version), tostring(host_object.os_version))),
    host_name_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_name_s)), tostring(host_name_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_name)), tostring(host_name), tostring(host_object.name))),
    host_full_name_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_full_name_s)), tostring(host_full_name_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_full_name)), tostring(host_full_name), tostring(host_object.full_name))),
    identities_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(identities_s)), tostring(identities_s), tostring(identities)),
    tactics_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(tactics_s)), tostring(tactics_s), tostring(tactics)),
    process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(process_iocs_s)), tostring(process_iocs_s), tostring(process_iocs)),
    file_modification_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(file_modification_iocs_s)), tostring(file_modification_iocs_s), tostring(file_modification_iocs)),
    network_connection_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(network_connection_iocs_s)), tostring(network_connection_iocs_s), tostring(network_connection_iocs)),
    registry_modification_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(registry_modification_iocs_s)), tostring(registry_modification_iocs_s), tostring(registry_modification_iocs)),
    detection_id_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_id_s)), tostring(detection_id_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_id)), tostring(detection_id), tostring(detection_object.id))),
    detection_url_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_url_s)), tostring(detection_url_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_url)), tostring(detection_url), tostring(detection_object.url))),
    detection_headline_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_headline_s)), tostring(detection_headline_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_headline)), tostring(detection_headline), tostring(detection_object.headline))),
    detection_details_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_details_s)), tostring(detection_details_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_details)), tostring(detection_details), tostring(detection_object.details))),
    detection_severity_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_severity_s)), tostring(detection_severity_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_severity)), tostring(detection_severity), tostring(detection_object.severity)))

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the detection was ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: child_process_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized child process indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: cross_process_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized cross-process indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: host_os_family_s
columns.description: Operating system family for the affected host.

columns.name: host_os_version_s
columns.description: Operating system version for the affected host.

columns.name: host_name_s
columns.description: Host name for the affected endpoint.

columns.name: host_full_name_s
columns.description: Fully qualified host name for the affected endpoint.

columns.name: identities_s
columns.description: Serialized identities associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: tactics_s
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactics associated with the detection.

columns.name: process_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized process indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: file_modification_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized file modification indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: network_connection_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized network connection indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: registry_modification_iocs_s
columns.description: Serialized registry modification indicators associated with the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: detection_url_s
columns.description: URL for the detection in Red Canary.

columns.name: detection_headline_s
columns.description: Headline for the Red Canary detection.

columns.name: detection_details_s
columns.description: Detection details provided by Red Canary.

columns.name: detection_severity_s
columns.description: Severity assigned to the Red Canary detection.

properties.displayName: Red Canary Threat Detection (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorDefinitionName.defaultValue: Red Canary Threat Detection (via Codeless Connector Framework)

properties.description: RedCanaryThreatDetection_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0
Triggers Incidents using detection data assembled by Red Canary.
properties.query:
let detectionLookback = 1d;
let newDetectionWindow = 5m;
RedCanaryDetections_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(detectionLookback)
| where isnotempty(detection_id_s)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by detection_id_s
| where FirstSeen >= ago(newDetectionWindow)
| extend    process_iocs_raw = column_ifexists('process_iocs_s', '[]'),
            child_process_iocs_raw = column_ifexists('child_process_iocs_s', '[]'),
            cross_process_iocs_raw = column_ifexists('cross_process_iocs_s', '[]'),
            file_modification_iocs_raw = column_ifexists('file_modification_iocs_s', '[]'),
            identities_raw = column_ifexists('identities_s', '[]')
| extend    process_ioc_array = todynamic(iff(isempty(process_iocs_raw), '[]', process_iocs_raw)),
            child_process_ioc_array = todynamic(iff(isempty(child_process_iocs_raw), '[]', child_process_iocs_raw)),
            cross_process_ioc_array = todynamic(iff(isempty(cross_process_iocs_raw), '[]', cross_process_iocs_raw)),
            file_mod_ioc_array = todynamic(iff(isempty(file_modification_iocs_raw), '[]', file_modification_iocs_raw)),
            identities_array = todynamic(iff(isempty(identities_raw), '[]', identities_raw))
| extend    evidence_array = array_concat(process_ioc_array, child_process_ioc_array, cross_process_ioc_array, file_mod_ioc_array)
| extend    evidence = todynamic(evidence_array[0]),
            identity = todynamic(identities_array[0])
| extend    file_hash_array = todynamic(evidence.file_hashes)
| extend    file_hash = todynamic(file_hash_array[0])
| project   detection_id_s,
            detection_url_s = column_ifexists('detection_url_s', ''),
            detection_headline_s = column_ifexists('detection_headline_s', ''),
            detection_details_s = column_ifexists('detection_details_s', ''),
            detection_severity_s = column_ifexists('detection_severity_s', ''),
            host_name_s = column_ifexists('host_name_s', ''),
            host_full_name_s = column_ifexists('host_full_name_s', ''),
            host_os_family_s = column_ifexists('host_os_family_s', ''),
            host_os_version_s = column_ifexists('host_os_version_s', ''),
            tactics_s = column_ifexists('tactics_s', ''),
            process_id = tostring(evidence.process_id),
            process_command_line = tostring(evidence.process_command_line),
            process_creation_time_utc = tostring(evidence.process_creation_time_utc),
            file_hash_algorithm = tostring(file_hash.algorithm),
            file_hash_value = tostring(file_hash.value),
            file_directory = tostring(evidence.file_directory),
            file_name = tostring(evidence.file_name),
            user_name = tostring(identity.user_name),
            user_uid = tostring(identity.user_uid)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Red Canary solution for Microsoft Sentinel enables Red Canary to publish threat detections into a Microsoft Sentinel custom table for alerting and incident creation.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Microsoft Sentinel Codeless Connector Framework

  2. Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API

  3. Data collection rules

Data Connectors: 1, Analytic Rules: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
